pull.title: cmake: Make `secp256k1_objs` inherit interface defines from `secp256k1`
pull.body:
This PR effectively adds `-DSECP256K1_STATIC` to usage requirements of `secp256k1_objs` on Windows, preventing LNK4217 linker warnings.

I overlooked this issue while reviewing https://github.com/bitcoin-core/secp256k1/pull/1678.

milestone.description: See https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/issues/32275 for release schedule of Bitcoin Core 30.0

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1

This change effectively adds `-DSECP256K1_STATIC` to usage requirements
of `secp256k1_objs` on Windows, preventing LNK4217 linker warnings.

cmake: Make `secp256k1_objs` inherit interface defines from `secp256k1`

This change effectively adds `-DSECP256K1_STATIC` to usage requirements
of `secp256k1_objs` on Windows, preventing LNK4217 linker warnings.

It would be nice to have this included in 0.7.0, along with #1678.
